name: io.qent.broxy/redis
title: Redis
description: In-memory data platform for caching, key-value operations, and real-time application state.

environmentVariables.description: Client's private key file for client authentication
environmentVariables.name: REDIS_SSL_KEYFILE

environmentVariables.description: Client's certificate file for client authentication
environmentVariables.name: REDIS_SSL_CERTFILE

environmentVariables.description: Whether the client should verify the server's certificate (default "required")
environmentVariables.name: REDIS_CERT_REQS

environmentVariables.description: Path to the trusted CA certificates file
environmentVariables.name: REDIS_CA_CERTS

environmentVariables.description: Enable Redis Cluster mode (True|False, default False)
environmentVariables.name: REDIS_CLUSTER_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Use the stdio or sse transport (default stdio)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
